Contact

Contact

Open to interesting problems — AI tooling, web platforms, and product work. If you're building something and need someone who ships, reach out.

Email

fehellstrom@gmail.com

For project discussions and opportunities.

LinkedIn

linkedin.com/in/felixhellstrom ↗

Best for professional connections and project inquiries.

GitHub

github.com/fellanH ↗

Open source projects and code. 99 repositories.

X / Twitter

@felixhellstrom ↗

Thoughts on AI, tools, and building.

Availability

Currently Technical Lead at Stormfors full-time. I take on select projects through my independent practice Klarhimmel. Best fit:

  • AI agent tooling and MCP integrations
  • Complex Webflow or HubSpot CMS builds
  • Content migration pipelines (Contentful, WordPress → HubSpot)
  • Technical architecture consulting

What happens next

If you reach out about a project, Ill usually reply within 1–2 business days.

  • Well start with a short email exchange or 30–45 minute call to understand scope, timelines, and constraints.
  • If its a mutual fit, Ill propose a concrete plan (phases, deliverables, budget) before we commit.
  • If its not a fit, Ill do my best to point you in a useful direction.

Location

Based in Stockholm, Sweden. Available for remote work globally.

Languages: Swedish (native) · English (fluent)
